entries.rationale: The upstream TypeScript/Ink TUI row is superseded by the Rust Ratatui CLI/TUI runtime; the cited Rust tests cover the equivalent input, rendering, gateway, slash/session, text, theme, or virtual-history behavior without requiring a JS runtime path.
